name: Doug Will Tennis Center
description: Doug Will Tennis Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Bridgewater, VA. There are 2 indoor hard courts. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. Amenities include restrooms and water. Reservations are available.

name: Edwards Tennis & Pickleball
description: Come play pickleball at Edwards Tennis & Pickleball in Port Republic, VA! The court surface is hard. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. Players have access to restrooms.

name: Generations Park
description: Some paddles and balls provided. Courts are outdoor but covered by pavilion.
open_play_schedule: Summer/Fall (Court area converts to ice skating rink in winter)

name: Massanutten Fitness & Rec Club
description: Massanutten Fitness & Rec Club is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in McGaheysville, VA. There are 6 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A membership is required to play. Players have access to restrooms. You can’t reserve the courts.
